_comment_thresholds: chatbot_threshold: complexity score (0-10) at or above which tasks are routed to AI chatbot UI instead of local Ollama. max_local_parallel: max simultaneous qwen3:4b/8b workers.
_comment_chatbot: chatbot_backends: override selectors/URLs per service. Leave empty to use built-in defaults in ai_chatbot_subagent.py.
